title: Model Files for Simulating the Impacts of Deep Geothermal Development on Shallow Hydrothermal Resources in a Rocky Mountain Rift Valley
author: Rush, Michael
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Model Files for Simulating the Impacts of Deep Geothermal Development on Shallow Hydrothermal Resources in a Rocky Mountain Rift Valley 
 Zip File Contains:  
 Control: no geothermal pumping 
 Injection East: geothermal injection well to the east of extraction well 
 Injection North: geothermal injection well to the north of extraction well 
 Injection South: geothermal injection well to the south of extraction well 
 Injection West: geothermal injection well to the west of extraction well
